value: semiosis implementation status (2026-06-19): COMPLETE for core pipeline. core/encoder.py: RandomEncoder (test stub), SentenceTransformerEncoder (real Matryoshka via sentence-transformers), AgglomerativeClusterer (scipy ward). core/store.py: InMemoryStore (dict + cosine knn, JSON save/load), InMemoryQuery (all 4 Query protocol methods). core/cone_engine.py: HyperbolicConeEngine (Lorentz manifold, Ganea 2018, overlap_score, batch_contains, close_transitivity). core/pipeline.py: KnowledgePipeline (encode->cluster->fit->store->query). core/agent_api.py: KnowledgeBase (ingest/search/explain_hierarchy/containment). Settings default model: sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (local HF). 85 tests pass. Validated on WebGL optimization facts.
